platform.kernel: Linux thor 6.8.12-tegra #1 SMP PREEMPT Tue Dec 30 15:40:41 PST 2025 aarch64 aarch64 aarch64 GNU/Linux

scope: Reports synchronized four-mode mounted-FUSE SQLite foreground QoS recovery.
Does not claim AI inference or TensorRT p99 restoration.
Uses workload-pressure telemetry derived from foreground SQLite slack plus background storage activity.
